title: Create: Unleashed
description: The modpack includes all the main add-ons for Create 0.5.1.j, expanding the capabilities of automation, transportation, decoration, and industry.
body:
**Create: Unleashed** takes the **Create 0.5.1** mod and cranks it into overdrive. With every major addon included, you can take automation, transport, decoration, and industry further than ever — from tiny precision gadgets to sprawling, city-sized factories.

# 🔩 Engineering Without Boundaries

Build whatever you can imagine — automated farms, massive rail networks, even steam-powered airships. Every mod in the pack blends seamlessly with Create’s style, so your contraptions look and feel like they belong.

# ⚡ Built for Performance

Packed with optimizations to keep gameplay smooth, even on lower-end PCs. Whether you’re running a solo megafactory or a busy multiplayer server, the pack is tuned for performance without cutting features.

# 🛠 Play Your Way

Tinker alone, team up with friends for massive builds, or combine engineering with exploration and combat. Extra content keeps survival fresh while staying true to Vanilla progression.

# 🌍 Perfect for Multiplayer

Open your world to friends instantly with **e4mc** or simple LAN hosting.
